title: Alabama
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Alabama

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Alabama

You can apply for Medicaid in Alabama by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Alabama

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Alabama

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Alabama

CHIP in Alabama

Alabama ALL Kids covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Alabama ALL Kids right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Alabama ALL Kids.
